summary: VIP Push Notifications for New Marketplace Offers - All Features Verified. Backend: PUT /api/pro/offers/{id}/publish correctly toggles publish status and sends 'new_offer' notifications to VIP users (excluding the mentor). Frontend: NotificationCenter.tsx has new_offer type with storefront icon and purple colors, routing to /marketplace on click.

Notification excludes mentor: uses filter {'is_vip': True, 'id': {'$ne': current_user['id']}}
Frontend NotificationCenter.tsx line 47: new_offer type has storefront icon with purple colors ['#7C3AED', '#6D28D9']
Frontend NotificationCenter.tsx line 165-167: new_offer notification routes to /marketplace
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP push notifications for new marketplace offers are working. When mentor publishes an offer, all VIP users (excluding the mentor) receive notification with type='new_offer', title='New Marketplace Offer', body='{mentor_name} just published: {offer_title}'. Backend logs confirm notifications sent to 5 VIP users. Frontend NotificationCenter handles new_offer type with storefront icon and navigates to /marketplace.
